name: data-science
description: Full data science pipeline: profile → features → train → evaluate → report

roles.description: Cleans raw data, handles missing values, builds feature pipelines, validates data quality
Trains models, tunes hyperparameters, compares approaches (sklearn, xgboost, etc.)
Tests on holdout set, checks for bias/fairness, validates metrics, runs cross-validation
Writes findings, generates visualizations, creates summary report

tasks.title: Profile the dataset: shape, dtypes, nulls, distributions, correlations
Clean data, handle missing values, create features, split train/test
Train 3+ model approaches, log metrics, save best model
Evaluate best model: accuracy, precision, recall, F1, confusion matrix, bias check
Write executive summary with findings, model performance, recommendations
